parameters.query:
with raw_payload as (
  insert into energy_data.raw_api_payloads (
    source_id,
    workflow_name,
    request_url,
    request_hash,
    response_status,
    payload
  )
  select
    s.id,
    $1,
    $2,
    md5($3::text),
    $4::integer,
    $3::jsonb
  from energy_data.data_sources s
  where s.code = $5
  returning id
), upserted as (
  insert into energy_data.grid_frequency_measurements (
    source_id,
    market_id,
    measured_at,
    target_hz,
    actual_hz,
    source_published_at,
    quality,
    raw_payload_id
  )
  select
    s.id,
    m.id,
    $6::timestamptz,
    $7::numeric,
    $8::numeric,
    $6::timestamptz,
    'ok',
    raw_payload.id
  from energy_data.data_sources s
  cross join energy_data.markets m
  cross join raw_payload
  where s.code = 'netzfrequenzmessung'
    and m.country_code = 'DE'
    and m.bidding_zone = 'DE-LU'
  on conflict (source_id, market_id, measured_at) do update
  set
    target_hz = excluded.target_hz,
    actual_hz = excluded.actual_hz,
    source_published_at = excluded.source_published_at,
    quality = excluded.quality,
    raw_payload_id = excluded.raw_payload_id,
    ingested_at = now()
  returning id
)
insert into energy_data.ingestion_runs (
  workflow_name,
  source_id,
  finished_at,
  status,
  records_read,
  records_written
)
select
  $1,
  s.id,
  now(),
  'success',
  1,
  count(*)::integer
from energy_data.data_sources s
cross join upserted
where s.code = 'netzfrequenzmessung'
group by s.id;
